item.description:
Markets reflected stagflationary pressures as the VIX spiked to 27 while gold pushed to $4,403, sign… — MARKET WRAP — Mar 24, 2026
Markets reflected stagflationary pressures as the VIX spiked to 27 while gold pushed to $4,403, signaling investor flight to hard assets amid persistent inflation concerns.

Markets retreated into defensive positioning as stagflation concerns intensified, with the VIX climb… — MARKET WRAP — Mar 23, 2026
Markets retreated into defensive positioning as stagflation concerns intensified, with the VIX climbing to 26.15 while bonds failed to provide refuge despite falling yields
